title: Blade in the Dark negates opponent magic

card.rawText: Play this card from your hand when your opponent plays a magic card. Negate the card effect and instead send it to the cemetery.

plan.title: Blade in the Dark negates opponent magic
plan.summary: Respond to opponent magic with Lightning and verify original magic effect is negated and sent to cemetery.

notes: Blade in the Dark is in player_1 hand. Player_2 plays a standard magic with visible effect.

steps: Open Lightning response window for player_1.
Player_1 plays Blade in the Dark targeting the chain magic.

expectedAssertions.label: Opponent magic effect did not resolve
Blade in the Dark sent to cemetery

manualVerification: Confirm response is only offered when opponent plays magic, not own latest chain link.
riskNotes: Card-specific negate condition may not be fully validated by chain runtime.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Partial Lightning support; verify negate condition and cemetery movement.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
